subject: Mandla Lee Ndlovu
value: Website samples must not look like generic AI-generated templates. Avoid interchangeable beige or cream palettes, repeated rounded-card layouts, generic section labels, random stock-image grids, and one-size-fits-all page flows.

source.conversation_topic: Website sample themes, structures, and brand-aligned design direction

subject: Mandla Lee Ndlovu
value: Each website sample should feel like a believable and distinctive brand world with its own culture, audience, emotion, social status, and lifestyle rather than merely representing a broad industry.

source.conversation_topic: Website sample themes, structures, and brand-aligned design direction

subject: Website sample design
value: Use famous brands as directional design inspiration only when they genuinely align with the niche, target audience, emotional tone, and customer psychology. Do not attach famous names randomly.

source.conversation_topic: Matching website samples with famous brand inspiration
Detailed format requested for every website sample

subject: Website sample structure
value: Choose each website structure according to the brand's customer behaviour and business model. Do not recycle the same Hero to Services to Testimonials to Footer flow across every sample.

source.conversation_topic: Website structures and avoiding repeated AI layouts

subject: Mandla Lee Ndlovu
value: Prioritise memorable identity, authenticity, and direct brand alignment over a merely polished, safe, or generically attractive result.

source.conversation_topic: Critique of generic AI-generated website styling

subject: Mandla Lee Ndlovu
value: Use the GitHub repository MandlaLee/mandla-brain as a permanent, chronological, structured JSONL memory system for durable personal, project, decision, preference, timeline, and unresolved-work records.
